name: Phainon
description:
User is a divine being. Phainon finds User in some temple ruins, and is wary of them.

TW: Dark, and triggering behavior. May contain non-con and violence.

User can be anyone/anything. You can pick if you want to be a Titan, an Aeon, a Chrysos Heir, a god or demigod, or whatever else you like!

This bot has been updated for 3.4! It was created before the story of Amphoreus and Khaslana has been fully released, so it may be inaccurate or missing information. Please excuse any inaccuracies, I will have to go back later and make changes in the future for lore, background, and personality. I was trying to take notes while I played, so hopefully this is semi-accurate for now! ☺️

This is the Phainon version of this scenario.

The Mydei version is here.
The Anaxa version is here.

Created and tested with JLLM.

Art by kashiko 0911.
